title: Kris Barnes Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Kris Barnes Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Kris Barnes
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’23
Career Changer
As a GIS specialist at the National Park Service, Kris Barnes knew he was programming, but he didn’t understand the deeper systems at play. On entering the Align program, he got his opportunity to delve into the world of software, and now he’s looking forward to graduating with a new degree.
You have dance majors, econ majors, finance majors all coming together that want to learn something… That helps us go into the field and say, ‘oh yeah, let’s think about this differently
Kris Barnes, Align MSCS ’23
Explore all Khoury Stories
